_comment: Gate 6 — closed-loop end-to-end evidence. The five real packages wired together against the safe simulator. Test: packages/test-infra/src/closed-loop.test.ts. Confirmed by a fresh-context adversarial reviewer to be a genuine proof (real package entrypoints, not stubbed; invariants asserted non-trivially).
stages_wired: audit sink -> C4 ActionRecord appended BEFORE the command

invariants_asserted.c2_corroboration_or_fastpath: EXECUTE disposition only reachable when corroborating_count>=2 OR fast_path (containment.ts)
invariants_asserted.fail_safe_no_command_on_partition: controlPlaneReachable=false => DENY_FAILSAFE, command===null, issuer.issue never called
invariants_asserted.llm_advisory_only: IncidentAnalysis is C7-only by construction; never an ActionRecord/AgentCommand

reviewer_verdict: PASS — genuinely wires 5 real packages and proves each invariant through production code, not hand-built objects
